title: Multi-Brand Gift Card Usage
description: Where and how can I use a multi-brand e‑gift card and what usage restrictions apply?
narrative: The user wants to compare acceptance networks, online/offline availability, excluded items, expiration dates, and balance‑combination rules for multi‑brand gift cards such as Galeries Lafayette, UpCadhoc, CADO, and Illinocado.

title: Beginner Lamb Tagine
description: Looking for a step‑by‑step lamb tagine recipe suitable for novice cooks that includes cooking times and nutritional information.
narrative: The user wants to learn how to prepare lamb tagine from scratch. They need a recipe that is beginner‑friendly, with clear instructions, a detailed time breakdown, and a displayed nutritional profile (calories, fats, carbs, etc.) to help them plan meals. Relevant documents are those offering simple, explicit directions, time estimates for each cooking phase, and nutrition data.

title: Elise Used Search
description: I wish to find a low‑mileage, affordable Lotus Elise for personal ownership.
narrative: The user is looking for a used Lotus Elise that is priced below €35 000, has less than 100,000 km, a manual gearbox, gasoline engine, and was manufactured between 2000 and 2010. Relevant documents should provide detailed listings matching these constraints.

title: Gluten‑Free Veal Paupiette
description: How can I make an alcohol‑free, gluten‑free veal paupiette with a mushroom‑onion sauce?
narrative: The user wants a step‑by‑step recipe for veal paupiettes that omits white wine and any flour‑based thickening, includes mushrooms and onions, and may add cream for a richer sauce, with clear cooking times and avoidance of gluten.

title: Legal Tint Installation
description: I want to understand how to choose and install legally compliant self‑tinted solar film on my car while also meeting safety and privacy goals.
narrative: User seeks guidance on selecting the appropriate transparency level, complying with TLV requirements (≥70% for front windshield), and balancing heat reduction, UV protection and privacy, including practical installation steps and safety considerations.

title: Kids Waterproof Clothing Store
description: I need to find an offline store that sells Petit Bateau kids waterproof wax clothing and learn about the loyalty points program.
narrative: The user requires both a location-based shopping solution and product-specific information. Relevance should therefore include references to Petit Bateau, children’s waterproof wax garments (or similar waterproof collections), physical store availability, and the brand’s loyalty points system. Documents that mention these aspects (store directories, product lines, and the loyalty program) will satisfy the query; others that only cover general collections or unrelated topics will be considered less relevant.

title: Renault Elite Auto discounts
description: How do the discount rates, LOA options, and total costs compare when buying a new Renault through Elite Auto versus a regular dealer or a Renault employee purchase?
narrative: The user seeks up‑to‑date, concrete details on all available price reductions, lease‑with‑option terms, insurance add‑ons, and the final total expenditure for a new Renault obtained via Elite Auto’s service, aiming to decide whether this alternative saves money compared to buying directly from a regular dealer or from a Renault staff member.

title: War School Purchase
description: What details are needed to order a War School book, covering e‑book formats, delivery, price, and payment options?
narrative: A prospective customer wants to place an order for a War School edition and therefore needs comprehensive information on digital format compatibility, shipping methods and times, inclusive pricing (including shipping and any discounts), secure payment options, and account management. Documents that provide any of these aspects are considered relevant; documents lacking such information are not.

title: Reloadable Rights Decision
description: How do I apply for the right of option and reload my unemployment benefits after returning to work?
narrative: I am a job‑seeker who recently resumed employment before exhausting my initial ARE rights. I want to know whether I qualify for the right of option, the detailed conditions (hours, days, salary thresholds), the procedural steps to apply, the time limits, and how exercising the option will affect my remaining entitlements and future reload eligibility. Relevant documents must address eligibility rules, calculation of new allowances, the 21‑day decision window, and the impact on any residual rights.

title: AXA Client Access
description: How do I log into my AXA customer space to manage my insurance and bank accounts?
narrative: The user seeks step‑by‑step guidance for securely logging into their AXA online client area, including retrieving a new ID or password, verifying the correct URL, and distinguishing between the insurance portal (client.axa.fr) and the separate banking portal (axabanque.fr). Relevant documents must explain authentication procedures, password recovery options, security checks, and how to view or modify contracts and accounts once logged in.

title: Battery Longevity Subsidies
description: What subsidies exist to help maintain or extend the battery life of electric cars, and how do they apply to specific models such as the Renault Zoe and Peugeot e‑208?
narrative: The user wants guidance on maximizing battery lifespan through maintenance practices and financial incentives. Relevant documents should cover battery care recommendations, warranty terms, and any available purchase, conversion, or retrofit subsidies that influence battery longevity. Answers that focus only on general EV pricing or performance are not relevant.

title: Bicarbonate Plant Health
description: How can I effectively use bicarbonate to treat downy mildew in tomatoes and potatoes, and is it safe to consume affected produce?
narrative: The user seeks detailed, evidence‑based instructions for preparing and applying a bicarbonate solution to control downy mildew on tomatoes and potatoes, including proper ratios, timing, and application techniques. They also want clear guidance on food safety: whether fruits or tubers showing symptoms can still be eaten, how to handle contaminated produce, and recommended disposal or storage practices. Relevance criteria include sources that describe bicarbonate dosage and application, reviews of its efficacy against the disease, and authoritative statements on the safety of consuming infected produce.

title: Three Days Darkness
description: What evidence supports or refutes the prophecy of a three‑day period of darkness affecting Earth, as described by New Age and religious sources?
narrative: The user seeks reliable scientific information on purported cosmic events (including eclipses, pole shifts, meteor showers, and atmospheric phenomena) that are linked to religious teachings, to assess authenticity and potential impact. Relevance requires documented scientific studies, astronomical data, and credible sources that discuss planetary dynamics and solar‑related events in relation to the claimed dates.

title: Legal French Space Comedy
description: Which platforms legally offer the film *La Folle Histoire de l'Espace* in French, and what are the viewing options and privacy considerations?
narrative: The user is trying to locate a legitimate source for watching *La Folle Histoire de l'Espace* in French. They want to know which streaming services or download options provide the film legally, whether the service is free, subscription‑based, or pay‑per‑view, and what the viewing experience will look like (e.g., subtitles, HD quality). Additionally, the user is concerned about privacy when using such platforms and seeks information on data collection, user consent, and potential data sharing. Relevant documents include descriptions of the film’s availability on various sites, the film’s synopsis on Horreur.net, and the privacy policy from FILMube that outlines data handling and privacy implications for streaming services.

title: Season 6 prospects for Le Bureau des légendes
description: What are the current plans and considerations regarding a potential sixth season of the French spy series ‘Le Bureau des légendes’?
narrative: The user is a devoted fan of the series who is disappointed by the lack of official confirmation for a sixth season. He wants to learn whether the creators, actors (especially Mathieu Kassovitz) or the Canal+ studio have discussed a renewal, a reboot, or a transition to an American adaptation. The user seeks up‑to‑date statements, quotes, and any information on production decisions, audience reception, critical acclaim, and commercial metrics that might influence the renewal decision, as well as possible spin‑offs or other future projects stemming from the series.

title: Prevail Usage Cases
description: Which grammatical contexts and conjugations are appropriate for the verb "prevail" (or French "prevaloir"), and how is it used in literature and modern contexts?
narrative: The user seeks detailed grammatical usage of "prevail"/"prevaloir", including conjugation patterns, transitive versus intransitive use, pronominal forms, and illustrative sentences such as "the conditions prevailing".

title: Celebrity Immersion Episodes
description: Which episodes of Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu feature celebrities traveling to remote communities, and what are the key details of those destinations?
narrative: The user wants a concise mapping of each episode (number, broadcast date, channel) to the celebrity participant and the remote community they explored, including community name, geographic location, cultural highlights, and notable interview topics. Relevance is determined by documents that list episode data, participant names, destination names, and descriptions of the community. Documents that do not provide these specific episode and community details are considered irrelevant.

title: Diarrhoea Diet
description: Which foods and drinks are suitable to eat during a diarrhoea episode, and which should be avoided?
narrative: The user seeks nutritional guidance to manage diarrhoea, requiring specific recommendations on allowable foods (e.g., cooked vegetables, white meats, low‑fiber fruits, plain yogurt after recovery), disallowed foods (raw vegetables, high‑fiber grains, dairy, sugary drinks), and beverages (water, mineral water, digestive teas), along with tips on portion timing and hydration.

title: Paris event space
description: I need to find a large event venue in Paris for a corporate gathering.
narrative: The user is looking for a spacious, versatile space in Paris that can accommodate a large group for a corporate event. Relevant documents should include details on the venue’s size, booking capacity, location, amenities, past event statistics, and contact information.

title: Dynamic Green Pricing
description: How can I choose an electricity supplier that delivers hourly dynamic pricing, full price transparency, and 100 % renewable energy for my apartment?
narrative: The user wants to compare suppliers that offer real‑time, hour‑by‑hour tariff information (so they can shift usage to cheaper slots), are fully transparent with no hidden charges, and guarantee that the supplied kWh comes from renewable sources. Relevance criteria: documents must describe dynamic pricing models, mobile‑app monitoring, renewable energy guarantees (e.g., Guarantees of Origin), and clear, cost‑free subscription structures without annual surprises.

title: Kia Niro Battery Comparison
description: How do the battery capacities, ranges, and incentive eligibility differ between the Kia Niro plug‑in hybrid and the fully electric Niro?
narrative: The user wants detailed technical information for the Kia Niro PHEV and Niro EV, including battery size (kWh), WLTP range figures, charging times, and eligibility for government incentive programs. Relevant documents should be drawn from official specifications, test reports, and policy texts; unrelated Kia models and non‑technical anecdotes should be excluded.

title: Gaul ancestry origin
description: Assess the historical validity of the claim that modern French ancestry stems from the ancient Gauls.
narrative: The user seeks evidence-based answers that clarify whether contemporary French people can be considered legitimate descendants of the ancient Gauls, taking into account the diversity of tribes in Gallia, the subsequent Romanization and Gallo‑Roman transformations, the medieval and modern construction of national identity, and the role of stereotypes and historiography in shaping this narrative. Relevant information should cite primary accounts (e.g., Caesar), archaeological findings of Celtic culture, linguistic studies linking Gaulish to French, scholarly critiques of the “a single French ancestor” narrative, and discussions on the impact of later migrations and colonization on French ancestry. Documents that do not address these criteria or merely repeat popular myths without scholarly backing should be considered irrelevant.}

title: Faro Rental Plan
description: I need to compare car‑rental offers at Faro Airport for a 2‑week trip, focusing on total price, free cancellation, insurance coverage, and optional extras such as GPS and child seats.
narrative: The user is planning a family vacation in the Algarve and wants to book a car at Faro Airport. Relevance is determined by listings that: (1) list pick‑up and return at Faro Airport, (2) provide the full cost up to day‑of‑pick‑up with no hidden fees, (3) offer free cancellation up to 24 hrs before departure, (4) include clear breakdown of insurance options (full coverage or deductible protection), and (5) allow optional add‑ons like GPS, child seat, and winter tires. Documents that fail to meet all these criteria are considered non‑relevant.

title: Nantes Station Car Rental
description: Which affordable and convenient car rental options are available at Nantes South Station that allow pickup immediately upon arrival?
narrative: The user intends to rent a vehicle right after arriving at Nantes South Station and wants to know the most cost‑effective options, including availability, pickup process, service hours, and any special features (e.g., immediate key release, one‑way drop‑off). Relevance criteria include price per day, 24/7 availability, proximity to the station, ease of booking and pickup, and user‑reported satisfaction.

title: Potato Disease Management
description: How can potato growers implement integrated control measures to prevent and treat downy mildew, late blight, and other fungal and bacterial diseases?
narrative: The user is a professional or advanced amateur grower seeking evidence‑based recommendations on cultural practices, fungicide usage, resistant varieties, and environmental monitoring to reduce yield losses from common potato pathogens. Relevance requires detailed explanations of disease biology, symptom identification, optimal fungicidal regimes, crop‑rotation guidelines, and varietal resistance information.

title: Selecting Beaujolais Wine
description: How can I choose a Beaujolais wine that best complements a chosen dish while understanding its terroir and appellation differences?
narrative: The user seeks detailed guidance on picking between Beaujolais Nouveau and other single‑cru Beaujolais wines, focusing on flavor profiles, appellation regulations, terroir characteristics, and food pairings. Relevance criteria include authoritative explanations of AOC distinctions, grape variety (Gamay), regional geography, production methods, and pairing recommendations for specific cuisines.

title: Boat Shoe Selection
description: What factors should I evaluate when purchasing a men's boat shoe?
narrative: The user seeks guidance on choosing a men's boat shoe that balances style, comfort, durability, and suitability for various contexts such as boating, seaside, and casual city wear. Relevance should include discussion of materials (full leather, nubuck), lacing, slip‑resistant soles, waterproofing, brand reputation (TBS, Timberland, Sperry), price ranges, sizing, maintenance tips, and comparison with alternatives like moccasins or sneakers.

title: Electric Compact Car
description: Looking for a 2023 Renault electric compact car under €30,000 with a minimum 200 km WLTP range.
narrative: The user wants to compare available 2023 Renault electric compact models that fit a budget constraint of €30,000 and offer at least 200 km range per charge, considering battery capacity, consumption figures, and applicable incentives. Relevance requires information on price, range, battery size, and any promotional bonuses relevant to the specified budget.

title: Corfu Car Rental
description: Which budget‑friendly car rental options in Corfu offer unlimited mileage, free cancellation, and pickup at the airport?
narrative: The user is planning a holiday in Corfu and wants to rent a vehicle for the duration of their stay. They are interested in comparing the most popular car‑rental agencies (Sixt, Europcar, and other local providers) to find a suitable budget vehicle in the Mini or Economy category that provides unlimited mileage, no hidden fees, and a free‑cancellation policy. The user also prefers pickup from Corfu (Ioánnis‑Kapodístrias) Airport or convenient city locations, and is particularly interested in agencies that supply newer cars (less than 6 months old). Relevant documents should include explicit daily rates, mileage and cancellation terms, pickup locations, and any special offers such as no credit‑card fees, since these criteria determine the best choice for the user's trip plan.}

title: Family Rental Comparison
description: I need to compare car rental options on Reunion Island that include free baby seats, unlimited mileage, and comprehensive insurance for a family trip.
narrative: The user seeks a comparison of agencies, focusing on price, mileage, insurance, driver options, transfer services, baby seat availability, and user ratings. Documents that discuss these criteria and provide clear, up‑to‑date details are considered relevant.

title: Switzerland Car Valuation
description: How can I estimate the market value of my used car in Switzerland based on its year, mileage, brand, and powertrain type?
narrative: The user is looking to determine a realistic sale or purchase price for a used vehicle specific to the Swiss market. Relevance should rely on Swiss-specific market data, notably listings from AutoScout24 and comparable platforms, and consider key factors such as vehicle age, mileage, brand prestige (including electric/hybrid options), engine type, and current demand. The answer should guide the user through gathering comparable ads, using valuation tools, and accounting for regional variations to produce an accurate market estimate.

title: Accident Compensation
description: How are compensation amounts determined for road accident victims under current French law?
narrative: The user is a recent road‑accident victim seeking a detailed guide on the entire compensation calculation process.  Relevance criteria include coverage of the Badinter law, victim categories (pedestrian, passenger, driver, cyclist), the assessment of physical, psychosensory, and aesthetic damages (AIPP, PRET, aesthetic and sexual prejudice), examples of real claim filings and figures, and practical steps for obtaining expert examinations and filing claims with insurers or the state.  The answer should explain the fee schedule, the weighting between bodily injury and loss of earning capacity, and any procedural nuances that affect the final award.

title: Accessible Venue Options
description: Which concerts and events at Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux are fully accessible for people with reduced mobility?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about the accessibility provisions for attendees with disabilities, including wheelchair access, assistance lines, and parking options. Relevant evidence includes Arkéa Arena’s dedicated accessibility contact (05 56 48 26), explicit mentions of facilities for people with reduced mobility, and any event listings that highlight such accommodations. Documents that only mention general event schedules or unrelated services are considered non‑relevant.

title: Women Farmers Records
description: I need primary source documents about women farmers in Indre‑et‑Loire between 1969 and 1976 to cite in a Wikipedia article.
narrative: The user seeks archival letters and related materials from the Menie Grégoire fonds housed in the Departmental Archives of Indre‑et‑Loire. Relevance is limited to original, dated 1969‑1976 sources that directly reference women farmers’s daily lives, correspondences, and activities, and that are either digitized or accessible upon request for research and encyclopedic citation.

title: Energy Dispute Resolution
description: What steps can I take to resolve a dispute with my electricity or natural gas supplier and what rights do I have?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed guidance on how to initiate and manage a dispute with their energy supplier, including how to contact the supplier’s customer service, the escalation steps required before involving the National Energy Ombudsman, the relevant time‑limits for lodging complaints, the procedure for mediation, and the possibility of appealing the Ombudsman’s recommendation. Documents that cover the ombudsman's role, the dispute resolution process, contact information, legal references, and examples from barometers or case law are considered relevant.

title: Tablet vs Laptop for Mobile Work
description: I’m looking for a device that can serve both as a lightweight laptop for occasional office tasks and as a tablet for on-the-go note‑taking and drawing.
narrative: The user wants recommendations that balance battery life, screen size, stylus support, connectivity (USB‑C, Thunderbolt), and price; relevant documents discuss hybrid devices such as the Asus ROG Flow X13, Huawei MatePad series, and note‑taking oriented 2‑in‑1 PCs.

title: Silver Print History
description: What are the key developments and techniques in silver photography from its inception to modern practice?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of silver photography, focusing on major milestones, chemical and printing processes, influential photographers, and the transition toward digital methods. Relevant documents should provide chronological context, explain technical details (e.g., calotype, wet/dry collodion, silver‑gelatin emulsion), and discuss how these historical practices inform contemporary silver print techniques.

title: Leek Quiche Alternatives
description: Where can I find leek quiche recipes that allow for ingredient substitutions, such as gluten‑free crusts and dairy‑free fillings?
narrative: The user wants recipe guidance on how to modify a traditional leek quiche to accommodate dietary preferences or restrictions, including alternatives to dough, eggs, milk, and cheese, as well as optional flavor additions like lardons or smoked salmon. Relevant documents should provide concrete substitution options, step‑by‑step instructions, and tips for preserving or freezing the finished quiche.

title: Quiet Play Without Materials
description: What quiet, minimal‑material games can I play with my children that are suitable for a quiet home setting?
narrative: The user is looking for a curated list of engaging games for children that require little or no hardware, so they can be played quietly at home while parents are working. Relevant documents should mention specific game names, target age ranges, minimal material requirements (paper, pencil, or printable cards), brief play instructions, and any downloadable resources or printable game cards. The answer should prioritize games that are practical for quiet play environments, such as mime, word and alphabet games, riddles, and simple hand‑or paper‑based games.

title: Mobility Assistance Eligibility
description: Under what circumstances can a registered jobseeker in France access Pôle emploi’s mobility assistance for job interviews, training, or job return?
narrative: The user seeks detailed eligibility criteria, including distance thresholds (60 km or 2 h round‑trip), benefit status, contract type, and required documentation; relevance requires information about benefit conditions, cost ceilings, application procedures, and eligible services such as SNCF vouchers or the SAM host‑family network.

title: Reset & link email
description: I need to reset my SFR account password and link a new email address. What steps should I follow?
narrative: The user is looking for a step‑by‑step procedure to recover a forgotten SFR password and afterwards bind a new e‑mail to the same account. Relevant instructions involve: providing the account e‑mail, entering the mobile number on file, receiving a verification code, resetting the password via the link sent to the e‑mail, and finally duplicating or updating the e‑mail address in the client area. The answer should mention both the online reset flow and the optional invoice‑based identifier recovery, and should describe how to verify the account via SMS or voice call.

title: Best Oil Lamp 2021
description: Which oil lamp is the best choice for 2021 based on performance, durability, and price?
narrative: The user seeks an authoritative recommendation for a 2021 oil lamp, prioritizing factors such as lamp size, fuel versatility, material quality, warranty, customer ratings, and overall value. Relevance is determined by documents that compare models, provide detailed specifications, consumer reviews, and guidance on selecting a lamp that balances brightness, durability, and cost.

title: Island Car Rental Costs
description: What are the most affordable and inclusive car‑hire options for a week‑long stay in Madeira, including pickup location, vehicle type, and insurance coverage?
narrative: The user wants to plan a rental car for a week in Madeira and is looking to minimise costs while ensuring comprehensive coverage. Relevance is based on documents that provide price ranges, discount information, insurance details (including no‑deductible options), pickup and return options at Madeira airport, vehicle categories suitable for island terrain, and specific agency comparisons. Documents that detail fees, delivery costs, and valid options such as fuel policy or additional driver are also relevant. Should exclude general car‑rental sites that do not give these detailed, Madeira‑specific insights.

title: New Potato Preparation
description: What is the best way to clean, store, and cook new potatoes, especially when they are sprouted or have delicate skins?
narrative: The user wants a practical guide for handling new potatoes from farm to table. They are concerned about sprouting, solanine toxicity, storage conditions, and the most effective cooking methods (sautéing, rissoler, baking) that preserve texture and flavor. Relevance is judged by documents that explain safe consumption of sprouted new potatoes, temperature and humidity recommendations for storage, and step‑by‑step recipes that highlight the unique qualities of early or 'shot' potatoes. Any source that merely names potato varieties without addressing preparation or safety is considered non‑relevant.

title: Employment Bonus & APRE
description: I need to know how to qualify for the employment bonus and the personalised back‑to‑work assistance and how to apply for them.
narrative: The user is an RSA beneficiary who has recently resumed work or training and is looking for precise eligibility criteria, required documentation, application deadlines, and how these vary across departments for both the employment bonus and APRE assistance.
